scripts.build:web: pnpm --filter @mini-analytics/shared build && pnpm --filter @mini-analytics/shared-ui build && pnpm --filter @mini-analytics/backend build && pnpm --filter @mini-analytics/dashboard build && pnpm --filter @mini-analytics/agent-ui build
scripts.validate:frontend: pnpm --filter @mini-analytics/shared-ui validate && pnpm --filter @mini-analytics/browser-extension validate && pnpm --filter @mini-analytics/dashboard build && pnpm --filter @mini-analytics/agent-ui build:web
scripts.validate: pnpm run validate:backend && pnpm run validate:frontend
scripts.build: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:agent
